nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Coding style rules for HarmonyOS/ArkTS development, covering ArkTS language constraints (type system, functions, classes, object access, destructuring, modules), naming conventions, formatting, file organization, comments, error handling, and immutability guidelines.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Defines recommended Claude Code hook configurations for HarmonyOS/ArkTS projects, including PostToolUse hooks for validating .ets/.ts edits, module.json5, and oh-package.json5 changes, plus a PreToolUse V1 decorator guard with a validation checklist.
nodes.languageNotes: Covers both HAP package build commands and DevEco Studio CLI hooks; the PreToolUse decorator guard enforces V2-only state management at edit time.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive ArkTS architectural patterns reference for HarmonyOS, mandating V2-only state management decorators, Navigation-based routing, MVVM architecture, ArkUI animation patterns, performance techniques (LazyForEach, component reuse), and resource reference conventions.
nodes.languageNotes: Explicitly prohibits V1 decorators (@State, @Prop, @Link, etc.) in favour of @ComponentV2/@ObservedV2/@Trace; provides working code examples for each pattern.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Security guidelines for HarmonyOS/ArkTS apps, covering permission management (module.json5 declarations and runtime request patterns), secret management, input validation, network security, data storage security, and dependency security practices.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Testing rules for HarmonyOS/ArkTS using the @ohos/hypium framework, defining test directory structure, unit and UI test examples with @Component, a TDD workflow, coverage requirements, and testing best practices.
